---
id: mqtt-subscribe
title: "获取 MQTT 连接配置"
description: "调用此接口，传入指定的设备 ID，获取 MQTT 连接与 topic 订阅所需的信息，包括 Client ID、MQTT 服务地址、MQTT 服务端口、支持的协议、用户名、密钥等。 <br />"
sidebar_label: "获取 MQTT 连接配置"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: i18n/zh/docusaurus-plugin-content-docs/version-Beta/aqara-developer/aiot-api/aiot-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"获取 MQTT 连接配置"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/subscriptions/mqtt/subscribe"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



调用此接口，传入指定的设备 ID，获取 MQTT 连接与 topic 订阅所需的信息，包括 Client ID、MQTT 服务地址、MQTT 服务端口、支持的协议、用户名、密钥等。 <br />
您可基于返回的客户端 ID 和特定规则，生成相关的 topic。加上其他返回的信息，通过第三方 MQTT 客户端连接 Aqara 提供的 MQTT Broker，订阅上述 topic，以实时获取指定设备的功能点值变化。


<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"Accesstoken","in":"header","required":false,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Accesstoken}}"},"description":"通过授权获取的访问 Token。"},{"name":"Appid","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Appid}}"},"description":"在 [Aqara 开发者平台](https://developer.aqara.com/) 创建应用时分配的 App ID。"},{"name":"Keyid","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Keyid}}"},"description":"在 [Aqara 开发者平台](https://developer.aqara.com/) 创建应用时分配的 Key ID。"},{"name":"Nonce","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Nonce}}"},"description":"随机字符串，每次请求都不同。"},{"name":"Time","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Time}}"},"description":"请求时间戳，单位毫秒。"},{"name":"Sign","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Sign}}"},"description":"请求签名。如需了解签名生成方法，请参考 [Sign 生成规则](https://opendoc.aqara.cn/docs/%E4%BA%91%E5%BC%80%E5%8F%91/API%E4%BD%BF%E7%94%A8%E6%8C%87%E5%8D%97/Sign%E7%94%9F%E6%88%90%E8%A7%84%E5%88%99.html)。"},{"name":"Lang","in":"header","required":false,"schema":{"type":"string","enum":["zh","en"],"example":"en"},"description":"语言，默认英文。支持 'zh', 'en' 两种语言。"}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":false,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"deviceUniqueId":{"type":"string","description":"设备唯一标识（设备 ID）。若不在此字段中配置设备 ID，也可在请求头（Header）的 `Device-Unique-Id` 字段中传递该信息。"},"expiresIn":{"type":"integer","format":"int32","description":"有效期（秒），取值范围为 [7200, 604800]；不在范围内或不传时默认 7200。","minimum":7200,"maximum":604800}},"title":"MqttSubscribeRequest"},"examples":{"subscribe":{"value":{"deviceUniqueId":"device-unique-id-001","expiresIn":7200}}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"请求发起成功","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"allOf":[{"type":"object","required":["type","version","msgId","code"],"properties":{"type":{"type":"string","description":"消息类型"},"version":{"type":"string","description":"接口版本","example":"v1"},"msgId":{"type":"string","description":"消息 ID"},"code":{"type":"integer","description":"业务状态码，0 表示成功"},"message":{"type":"string","description":"提示信息"}},"title":"BaseResponse"},{"type":"object","properties":{"data":{"type":"object","required":["clientId","mqttHost","mqttPort","supportedProtocols","secretId","secretKey","expiresIn"],"properties":{"clientId":{"type":"string","description":"MQTT Client ID。获取此信息后，请按规则 `receive_${clientId}` 生成订阅 topic。<br />\n示例：当 `clientId` 为 `omqt.studio_16ce93b6fc723f0d9f0dc02f4d4a2f15_123456789` 时，topic 为 `receive_omqt.studio_16ce93b6fc723f0d9f0dc02f4d4a2f15_123456789`。\n"},"mqttHost":{"type":"string","description":"MQTT 服务地址。"},"mqttPort":{"type":"string","description":"MQTT 服务端口。"},"supportedProtocols":{"type":"array","description":"支持的协议列表。","items":{"type":"string"}},"secretId":{"type":"string","description":"Base64 编码后的 MQTT 用户名。"},"secretKey":{"type":"string","description":"Base64 编码后的 MQTT 密钥。"},"expiresIn":{"type":"integer","format":"int32","description":"订阅有效期（秒）。"}},"title":"MqttSubscribeData"}}}],"title":"MqttSubscribeResponse"},"examples":{"subscribeSuccess":{"value":{"type":"MqttSubscribeResponse","version":"v1","msgId":"2df2f431-xxxx-4fdb-xxxx-xxxxxxxx","code":0,"message":"success","data":{"clientId":"omqt.studio_16xxxxxxxxxxx9","mqttHost":"mqtt.xxx.com","mqttPort":"1883","supportedProtocols":["tcp"],"secretId":"YmFzZTY0xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxJldElk","secretKey":"YmFzZTY0xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxleQ==","expiresIn":7200}}}}}}},"400":{"description":"请求参数错误","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"example":{"type":"ErrorMessage","version":"v1","msgId":"a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-err000000001","code":400,"message":"参数
